p.strong: Block (I,J) of C computed from blocks A[I,K] and B[K,J]
p.em: Optimization: Maximizing Temporal and Spatial Locality
Hardware Target: L1D Cache (32KB, 8-way set associative)

ul.li: Temporal Locality: Every element in a_cache is accessed 32 times for the dot product of 32 rows/columns.
Spatial Locality: Row-major access in A and C ensures 16 sequential FP32 values populate a single cache line.
Result: Blocking changes the algorithm from Memory-Bound to Compute-Bound.

ol.li: FMA (Fused Multiply-Add) logic pulls directly from SRAM cells.
C-block remains "Dirty" in L1 until the K-loop completes.
